channel.title: younglawyer TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from younglawyer

item.title: our house flooded… for a third time! Thank you to our friends and family! @JustMeSimplyG #younglawyer #lifewithgretch #nickandgretch #marriedlife

item.title: They say Karen represents a person who is rude, demanding, and self-centered. If you were lucky enough to know our mom, you know that is so very far from the truth. Our mom was the most beautiful, thoughtful, strong, selfless woman. While her 72 years on
item.description: They say Karen represents a person who is rude, demanding, and self-centered. If you were lucky enough to know our mom, you know that is so very far from the truth. Our mom was the most beautiful, thoughtful, strong, selfless woman. While her 72 years on
